payload.answer: Two conflicting employment states recorded. Sam's current employer is ambiguous: either Goldman Sachs (if Point72 join is future/rejected) or Point72 (if join supersedes Goldman role). Requires timestamp or user clarification to establish sequence.
citations: Input fact 1: Sam works at Goldman
payload.decision: Record both facts with temporal ambiguity; flag for user clarification

entity_resolution.reason: Concurrent writes indicate possible job transition; temporal ordering unknown

payload.intent: Classify and resolve concurrent conflicting employment facts for Sam

details: Conflict flagged as temporal ordering ambiguity
No fact presented as superseded without explicit confirmation
User clarification required for durable memory commitment

repair_options: Request timestamp for each employment event
